race.comment: CHILLI MARGS (9) improving filly ready for this trip and further now. Motored late from the wide gate with an eye catching fifth over 1400m at Randwick in this class. Gets a better set-up today and will prove hard to stop. MR MILLER (6) nice colt who covered a stack of ground at his second career start with a fighting second over 1400m at Randwick. Maps well and will relish the 1600m. Leading player. OCEAN CHILL (11) racing well on the country and provincial tracks and comes here in peak condition fifth-up. Will roll forward with Fitzgerald's 3kg claim and give a great sight. NOBLER (3) good type heading in the right direction. Up sharply in weight and not sure he will be suited at this track. Keep safe. CROSSBOW (2) racing well and back in grade after catching the eye behind NOBLER last start. Respect.
